welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points after spending $6,000 in eligible purchases on your Card in the first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 7/29/2026.
notes: Official Amex/Hilton pages are canonical; elevated public Hilton Aspire offer ends 7/29/2026.

caveats: Caveat: Hilton Diamond status does not guarantee executive lounge / club access in all properties, brands, room types, or club-access scenarios. Display as conservative caveat, not benefit removal.
Keep this caveat scoped to lounge/club-access expectations; do not reduce the Diamond status benefit itself.

open_questions: Confirm the 7/29/2026 expiry remains visible before applying future changes.

community.summary: Official Amex/Hilton sources support the elevated Hilton Aspire 175k public limited-time offer. Added 2026-06-30 caveat/refresh monitoring notes.

observations.excerpt: Official sources describe the Hilton Aspire limited-time 175,000-point offer ending 7/29/2026.
